title: Can't hide subitem columns in a Monday form
excerpt:
Hi! 
Even when we were able to do it before, now when we try to hide a subiter column in a form, we are not able to do it. 
A pop-up appears saying: “Failed to update form settings”. 
Thanks in advance for your help!

posts.author: priscilavindas (Priscila Vindas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi!

Even when we were able to do it before, now when we try to hide a subiter column in a form, we are not able to do it.
A pop-up appears saying: “Failed to update form settings”.
Thanks in advance for your help!

posts.author: Clarey (MondayMotivator)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @priscilavindas I assume you have tired selecting each item on its own and classifying using the dots?

image613×461 21.1 KB

There should also be the option to hide all the subitems:

image1115×436 26.7 KB

I would check column permissions: Make sure the subitem column isn’t restricted or hidden from your user role. Then suggest to reach out to support / Help chat on your monday.com account as I seem to have no issue.

Would you like help drafting a message to Monday.com support or exploring alternative ways to structure your form without subitems? let me know with a like if this helped! Hope you get it sorted soon!

posts.author: priscilavindas (Priscila Vindas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks a lot! This is good!
Regards!
